_comment: A custom Craftics enemy that adopts the Aether mod's Moa (aether:moa) as a turn-based combat enemy. 'ai' names a custom AI this addon registers in code (see MoaAI.java); it fights in melee while healthy and kites at range when wounded. 'range' 4 gives that ranged phase its reach. 'speed' 3 overrides the default move speed because a Moa is fast. Biome JSON references this enemy with {"enemy": "exampleaddon:moa"}.
